gS (i) 286@450 fd-eh- ls 286@950 fd-eh- ds chp t;iqj dh vksj esa fLFkr Vksy Iyktk ij 55-875 fd-eh- ¼273-500 fd-eh- ls 329-375 fd-eh- rd½ (ii) 360@200 fd-eh- ls 360@700 fd-eh- ds chp fd”kux<+ dh vksj fLFkr Vksy Iyktk ij 34-510 fd-eh- ¼329-375 fd-eh- ls 363-885 fd-eh- rd½ [Qk- la- vkjMCY;w@,u,p&37011@65@2002&ihvkbZlh] yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo fVIi.k% fVIi.k% fVIi.k% fVIi.k% ewy vf/k lwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti= esa dk-vk- la- 1457¼v½] rkjh[k 20 fnlEcj] 2003 }kjk izdkf”kr dh xbZ Fkh rFkk ckn esa blesa dk-vk- 349¼v½] rkjh[k 15 ekpZ] 2005 }kjk la”kks/ku fd;k x;kA -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th March, 2016 S.O. 659 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highways) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby amends the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number S.O. 1457(E) dated the 20th December 2003 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (ii) and subsequent amendment vide S.O. No. 349(E) dated the 15th March,2005 namely:— In the said amendment notification S.O. No. 349(E) dated the 15th March, 2005, Note 7 shall be substituted as under: In place of “7. The road user shall pay the actual fee at the first plaza only and shall provide proof of such payment at the subsequent plaza”. Read as “7. Fee shall be levied at the following Toll Plaza(s) for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable (i) Toll Plaza at Jaipur end between km 286/450 to km 286/950 55.875 km (from km 273.500 to km 329.375) (ii) Toll Plaza at Kishangarh end between km 360/200 to km 360/700 34.510 km (from km 329.375 to km 363.885) [F. No. RW/NH-37011/65/2002-PIC] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide S.O. No. 1457(E) dated the 20th December, 2003 and subsequent amendment vide S.O. No. 349(E) dated 15th March, 2005. Uploaded by the Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
